programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Terraforming: Can We Build A Planet B?"
programs.sub_title: Terraforming: Can We Build A Planet B?
programs.desc: Once we’ve managed to get a handle on building structures to help us live on the harsh, dangerous surfaces of other celestial bodies -- why stop there?

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Carbon Costs: Is Space Exploration Even Worth It?"
programs.sub_title: Carbon Costs: Is Space Exploration Even Worth It?
programs.desc: Each rocket that gets fired off has an impact on the atmosphere. Will Earth be able to survive hundreds, or even thousands, of fuel-burning rocket launches every year.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Looting The Moon For Trillions of Dollars"
programs.sub_title: Looting The Moon For Trillions of Dollars
programs.desc: With NASA planning to make a manned return trip to the moon by 2024, how long until some giant corporation turns moon dust into a cosmic-sized payday?

programs.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Exo Planets"
programs.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programs.title: The New Frontier S1 - "Edge of the Universe"
programs.desc: What we see in the night sky is only a small percentage of the contents of the Universe, most is dark matter and dark energy we know it exists; however its nature eludes us for the moment.
